title: Ancient continents may have made life on Earth possible - Earth.com
description: Ancient continents may have made life on Earth possible Earth.com How the rise of continents may have set the stage for life on Earth Phys.org

title: Ancient continents may have made life on Earth possible
description: Earth’s earliest continents may have transformed toxic ancient oceans into environments stable enough for life to emerge

title: Security-of-Supply Pushes Fossil Fuel Investment Rethink
description: Geopolitics and Energy Security Collide A truly messy set of circumstances has been buffeting the U.S. and Canadian economies. title: Culture | Residential complex in China's Hunan retains ancient charm
description: YONGZHOU, May 11 (Xinhua) -- Nestled amid the mountains of Jianghua Yao Autonomous County in Yongzhou, Baojing Village was built by the ancestors of the He family in 1650, and is therefore called the "Courtyard of Family He."
